Package com.rhlowery.acs.service

Interface CatalogProvider

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractMockProvider, AtlanNodeProvider, DatabricksNodeProvider, DataHubNodeProvider, GlueNodeProvider, GravitinoNodeProvider, HiveMetastoreNodeProvider, IcebergNodeProvider, PolarisNodeProvider, UnityCatalogNodeProvider
public interface CatalogProvider
Interface for catalog metadata providers. Defines methods for hierarchical discovery of databases, tables, and other resources, as well as policy application and verification. [PlantUML: Catalog Metadata Discovery hierarchy and policy application methods]

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    applyPolicy(String path, String action, String principal)
    Applies an access policy to a resource.
    default Map<String,String>
    getCapabilities()
    Returns a map of capabilities and metadata for this provider.
    String
    getCatalogId()
    Returns the unique identifier for this catalog.
    List<CatalogNode>
    getChildren(String path)
    Discovers children nodes of a given resource path.
    String
    getEffectivePermissions(String path, String principal)
    Retrieves effective permissions for a user on a given path.
    CatalogNode
    getNode(String path)
    Retrieves metadata for a specific resource path.
    default String
    getProviderName()
    Returns a human-readable name for the provider.

  • Method Details

    • getCatalogId

      String getCatalogId()
      Returns the unique identifier for this catalog.
      Returns:
      Unique catalog ID

    • getProviderName

      default String getProviderName()
      Returns a human-readable name for the provider.
      Returns:
      Provider name

    • getCapabilities

      default Map<String,String> getCapabilities()
      Returns a map of capabilities and metadata for this provider.
      Returns:
      Capability map

    • getChildren

      List<CatalogNode> getChildren(String path)
      Discovers children nodes of a given resource path.
      Parameters:
      path - The parent resource path (e.g., /main/default)
      Returns:
      List of child nodes

    • getNode

      CatalogNode getNode(String path)
      Retrieves metadata for a specific resource path.
      Parameters:
      path - The resource path
      Returns:
      The node metadata

    • applyPolicy

      void applyPolicy(String path, String action, String principal)
      Applies an access policy to a resource.
      Parameters:
      path - The target resource path
      action - The privilege to grant (e.g., SELECT, OWNERSHIP)
      principal - The user or group to grant it to

    • getEffectivePermissions

      String getEffectivePermissions(String path, String principal)
      Retrieves effective permissions for a user on a given path.
      Parameters:
      path - The resource path
      principal - The user identifier
      Returns:
      The privilege string
